# Least Mean Square Estimation

**Summary**: An adaptive filtering algorithm used to estimate and subtract unwanted signals from a primary signal.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009]] applied least mean square estimation to determine the diffracted wavelet for subtraction from original data.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- The attenuation algorithm employed least mean square estimation of the diffracted wavelet to remove it from the original shot gather. ([[2009-al-lehyani|Al-Lehyani, 2009, p. 83]])
